app.localizedDescription:
Apollo-Reborn is the community-maintained Apollo sideload build powered by the Apollo-Reborn tweak.

It restores custom API support, media fixes, uploads, inline media, translation, saved categories, Home Screen and Lock Screen widgets, Liquid Glass support on iOS 26+, and the rest of the project’s ongoing fixes and enhancements.

These sources are intended for AltStore Classic, SideStore, and Feather. Apollo-Reborn is not compatible with AltStore PAL.

Choose the source variant that matches how you sideload:

• Standard: full app bundle with Apollo’s working extensions plus Apollo-Reborn widgets
• No Extensions: strips app extensions, including widgets, to reduce App ID usage on free Apple IDs
• GLASS: adds the Liquid Glass iOS 26 patch and bundled Liquid Glass icon catalog
• No Extensions + GLASS: combines both options

The extension-bearing builds (Standard and GLASS) register about 7 App IDs, one per bundled app extension. A free Apple ID can register 10 App IDs per 7 days, so a clean single install fits, but it is easy to exceed if you install under more than one bundle ID, reinstall within the same week, or sideload other extension-bearing apps. If an install fails with an App ID error, use a No Extensions build (1 App ID) or wait for older App IDs to expire. A paid Apple Developer account has a much higher cap.

This project is not affiliated with Apollo or Christian Selig.

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used to take photos to upload for sharing.
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Used to save media or to select images to upload for sharing.
privacy.NSMotionUsageDescription: Detect rotations in Media Viewer and offer corresponding options.
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Checked once to calculate sunset/sunrise times for the location.
privacy.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Unlock Apollo when re-opening in order to prevent unauthorized access.

source.name: Apollo-Reborn
source.subtitle: Standard Apollo-Reborn source
source.description: Standard Apollo-Reborn source for AltStore Classic, SideStore, and Feather. Includes the main app, Apollo’s working bundled app extensions, and the Apollo-Reborn widget extension. Registers about 7 App IDs, one per bundled extension; on a free Apple ID (limited to 10 App IDs per 7 days) a clean install fits but leaves little headroom, so use the No Extensions source if you hit the App ID limit. Not compatible with AltStore PAL.

source.name: Apollo-Reborn - No Extensions
source.subtitle: Apollo-Reborn source with app extensions removed
source.description: No Extensions Apollo-Reborn source for AltStore Classic, SideStore, and Feather. Strips app extensions, including widgets, so the sideloaded app uses just 1 App ID, staying well under a free Apple ID’s limit of 10 App IDs per 7 days — the headroom-friendly choice if the extensions build won’t install. Not compatible with AltStore PAL.

source.name: Apollo-Reborn - GLASS
source.subtitle: Apollo-Reborn source with Liquid Glass patch
source.description: GLASS Apollo-Reborn source for AltStore Classic, SideStore, and Feather. Includes Apollo-Reborn widgets, the Liquid Glass iOS 26 patch, and bundled Liquid Glass alternate icons. Registers about 7 App IDs, one per bundled extension; on a free Apple ID (limited to 10 App IDs per 7 days) a clean install fits but leaves little headroom, so use the No Extensions + GLASS source if you hit the App ID limit. Not compatible with AltStore PAL.

app.name: Apollo for Reddit - GLASS
app.subtitle: Apollo-Reborn build with Liquid Glass patch

source.name: Apollo-Reborn - No Extensions + GLASS
source.subtitle: Apollo-Reborn source without extensions and with Liquid Glass patch
source.description: No Extensions + GLASS Apollo-Reborn source for AltStore Classic, SideStore, and Feather. Uses 1 App ID, omits widgets, and includes the Liquid Glass iOS 26 patch plus bundled Liquid Glass alternate icons. Not compatible with AltStore PAL.

app.name: Apollo for Reddit - No Extensions + GLASS
app.subtitle: Apollo-Reborn build without extensions and with Liquid Glass patch

source.name: Apollo-Reborn - GLASS Icons
source.subtitle: Apollo-Reborn source with the Liquid Glass icon catalog only
source.description: GLASS Icons Apollo-Reborn source for AltStore Classic, SideStore, and Feather. Includes Apollo-Reborn widgets and bundles the Liquid Glass alternate icon catalog without the iOS 26 UI runtime opt-in, so legacy UIKit behaviors (such as the bottom tab bar swipe gesture) are preserved. Registers about 7 App IDs, one per bundled extension; on a free Apple ID (limited to 10 App IDs per 7 days) a clean install fits but leaves little headroom, so use the No Extensions + GLASS Icons source if you hit the App ID limit. Not compatible with AltStore PAL.

app.name: Apollo for Reddit - GLASS Icons
app.subtitle: Apollo-Reborn build with the Liquid Glass icon catalog only

variants.notesLabel: No Extensions + Liquid Glass icons-only build.

source.name: Apollo-Reborn - No Extensions + GLASS Icons
source.subtitle: Apollo-Reborn source without extensions and with the Liquid Glass icon catalog only
source.description: No Extensions + GLASS Icons Apollo-Reborn source for AltStore Classic, SideStore, and Feather. Uses 1 App ID, omits widgets, and bundles the Liquid Glass alternate icon catalog without the iOS 26 UI runtime opt-in. Not compatible with AltStore PAL.

app.name: Apollo for Reddit - No Extensions + GLASS Icons
app.subtitle: Apollo-Reborn build without extensions and with the Liquid Glass icon catalog only
